str.authority: Israel Money Laundering and Terror Financing Prohibition Authority (IMPA)
str.notes: Unusual Activity Reports must be filed immediately upon forming suspicion. Financial Asset Service Providers licensed by CMISA are reporting entities under the Prohibition on Money Laundering Law 5760-2000. Filed via IMPA's electronic system.

ctr.authority: Israel Money Laundering and Terror Financing Prohibition Authority (IMPA)
ctr.notes: Reports required for transactions of ILS 50,000 or more. Financial service providers must report above-threshold transactions under the Anti-Money Laundering Order.
